Details: A full-scale drinking water treatment plant in Canada reported removing 64 percent of DOC using ultrafiltration [2468]. In a study of the Fyne process [2473], ultrafiltration membranes demonstrated good TOC removal. An ES404 membrane achieved 86 to 91 percent TOC removal in recycle mode and 90 to 96 percent TOC removal in dead-end mode.  A CA2PF membrane achieved 62 to 71 percent TOC removal in recycle mode and 86 percent TOC removal in dead-end mode.
